title: Arachnothryx chimboracensis
taxonomy: Arachnothryx chimboracensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is native to Ecuador and has been classified as a member of the Rubiaceae family. The Rubiaceae family, also known as the madder family, is a large and diverse group of flowering plants. This family includes over 600 genera and approximately 13,000 species. Arachnothryx chimboracensis is one of the many species within this extensive and widespread family.
